query: Count all buildings in Drammen municipality that intersect 200-year flood zones.
errors: Not all planned steps executed successfully.

terminal_context.last_ai_content: {"type": "function", "name": "tool_validate_sql", "parameters": {"sql": "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM matrikkelenbygning.bygning AS b INNER JOIN kommuner.kommuner AS k ON b.kommunenummer = k.kommunenummer INNER JOIN flomaktsomrader.flomaktsomrader AS f ON ST_Intersects(b.geometri, f.geometri) WHERE k.navn = \'Drammen\' AND f.ars = 200", "databaseName": "matrikkelenbygning", "step_number": "1"}}
